privileged_info_summary: The task operates within a synthetic scenario where the agent must diagnose three vehicles (Fiat Punto 1.4 Natural Power, Alfa Romeo Giulietta 1.4 MultiAir Turbo, and Fiat Ducato 2.3 Multijet) using Multiecuscan in simulation mode. The ECU data, parameters, and DTCs are predetermined dummy values hardcoded into Multiecuscan's simulation environment. The task explicitly requires the creation of a comprehensive comparative text report at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\MultiecuscanTasks\fleet_priority_matrix.txt, which must contain a side-by-side comparison table, priority rankings from 1 to 3, detailed ECU/DTC information per vehicle, and pre-service actions.
